nodes.title: List Sidebar Sections
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-sections with Authorization header. Returns array of sidebar sections with {id, name, icon, order, items[]}.

nodes.title: Create Sidebar Section
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-sections with {name, icon?, order?}. Creates sidebar section. Returns created section.

nodes.title: List Sidebar Items
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-items with Authorization header. Returns array of sidebar items with {id, sectionId, name, icon, route, order}.

nodes.title: Create Sidebar Item
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-items with {sectionId, name, icon?, route, order?}. Creates sidebar item within a section. Returns created item.

nodes.title: Copy Sidebar Config
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-config/copy with {fromUserId, toUserIds: []}. Copies sidebar configuration from one user to multiple users. Returns {message: 'تم النسخ بنجاح', copiedTo: count}.

nodes.title: Reset Sidebar Config
nodes.description: POST /api/businesses/:bizId/sidebar-config/reset/:userId. Removes all user-specific sidebar customizations, reverting to default. Returns {message: 'تم إعادة التعيين'}.
